archimate:DataObject.name: Eurostat Data Catalogue
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: The EUROSTAT data catalogue is a comprehensive repository of statistical data and indicators maintained by EUROSTAT, the statistical office of the European Union (EU). It serves as a central platform for accessing a wide range of statistical information about the EU and its member states. The catalogue provides a structured and organized collection of datasets covering various domains such as economy, population, employment, agriculture, trade, and many others.
Publisher: Eurostat
Source: https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/web/main/home
LOST view: SV-Datasets Catalogue Solutions
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/EurostatDataCatalogueDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/EurostatDataCatalogueDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataSetCatalogueDataObject

properties.value: The EUROSTAT data catalogue is a comprehensive repository of statistical data and indicators maintained by EUROSTAT, the statistical office of the European Union (EU). It serves as a central platform for accessing a wide range of statistical information about the EU and its member states. The catalogue provides a structured and organized collection of datasets covering various domains such as economy, population, employment, agriculture, trade, and many others.
